strategic_logic:
1. **Baseline Capability Check**: - Assumed SOTA: OpenAI o1/o3-series (System 2 reasoning), Claude 3.5 Sonnet (agentic efficiency), Gemini 2.0 (multimodal integration). - Reference Date: February 22, 2025. - Status: Transition from System 1 (probabilistic next-token prediction) to System 2 (search-based inference-time reasoning) is complete. Agentic planning on complex code/legal tasks is consistent.
2. **Causal Mapping**: - Compute: GPU clusters are scaling to 1M+ H100 equivalents. Training compute is hitting the 10^26 FLOP frontier. - Bottleneck: Power delivery (MW to GW) is the primary constraint. 24-month lag between cluster funding and operational capability. - Capability-Economics Lag: 9 months for frontier capabilities to be operationalized via specialized agentic workflows in G-SIBs and Fortune 100.
3. **Probabilistic Stances (Zero Hedging)**: - Functional AGI (ability to perform any intellectual task human can): 85% probability by Q4 2028. - Economic "Hollow-out" (Initial 5-8% structural unemployment in knowledge sectors): 70% probability by Q3 2026. - Regulatory Stance: EU AI Act enforcement results in 15% CapEx premium for EU-based AI labs compared to US/China. - Energy: 60% probability of sovereign "Power for Compute" mandates by 2026, diverting civil energy grid priority to AI infrastructure.
